thought.text: I couldn't find any references to README in the project files either. Let me check if there's a GitHub repository URL in any other configuration files or documentation.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "find /workspace/project -type f | xargs grep -l \"https://\" 2>/dev/null", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Search for URLs in all files"}
